page_description: A dark overlay screen displaying task instructions for a usability test. The text instructs the user to imagine booking a return domestic flight within Australia using the Flight Centre website.
The same task instruction screen as frame 0, showing the initial part of the text.
The task instruction screen with the full text visible and an 'Open' button at the bottom to proceed to the website.

page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
page_description: The Flight Centre homepage featuring a large 'Tropical Islands Sale' hero banner. The flight search widget is visible at the top with skeleton loaders for the input fields.
A 'Travel dates' modal is open over the homepage, showing calendars for February and March 2026. A Honey browser extension popup is visible on the right side of the screen.
The travel dates modal with the cursor hovering over March 20th.
The travel dates modal with March 20th and March 22nd selected as the travel range. The cursor is hovering over the 'Done' button.

page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
page_description: The homepage with the search widget populated: Adelaide to Melbourne, Mar 20 - Mar 22. A 'Search flights' button is now active.
A blank white screen during the transition to the search results page.
A loading screen with the message 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' and airline logos appearing at the bottom.
The search results page for the departing flight from Adelaide to Melbourne. It shows a list of flight options with times, airlines (Qantas, Virgin, Jetstar), and prices.
The same departing flight results page as frame 10.
The search results page for the return flight from Melbourne to Adelaide. A summary of the selected departing flight is shown at the top.
The same return flight results page as frame 12.
A loading screen with the message 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...' and a progress spinner.
An ancillaries page offering the 'Online Captain's Pack' for $9.95. A 'Continue' button is visible at the bottom.
A scrolled-up view of the ancillaries page showing the 'Seats' selection section and the 'Online Captain's Pack' section.
A loading screen with the message 'Thanks for confirming your flights. Next up, your traveller details...'.
A blank white screen during the transition to the passenger details page.
A dark overlay screen from the testing platform asking 'What's making you hesitate there'. It includes buttons to open the site or repeat instructions.
